expectations.text: Review does NOT include a complexity/split advisory
Review does not flag breaking changes

expectations.evidence: No explicit Request Changes verdict — ends with 'one likely bug' implying changes needed but not using the term

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: Flags code duplication as a concern and suggests 'as any' cast cleanup — both are pre-existing style concerns
